mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, stable_key, name, resource_types, condition_definition, status, revision
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_data_scope SET name = #{name}, resource_types = #{resourceTypes,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, condition_definition = #{conditionDefinition,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
